metadata.title: GameTrend — Create and share party games with friends
metadata.description: The community platform to create, share and play original party games with your friends. Discover hundreds of presets imagined by the community, or build your own in a few clicks.
metadata.ogTitle: GameTrend — Multiplayer party games, made by the community
metadata.ogDescription: Build your own party games and play with friends. Creator community, free presets, online or local play.

profile.title: Profile

seo.publicFallbackDescription: @{username} has published {count, plural, one {# preset} other {# presets}} on GameTrend. Check out their creations and play with friends.

profile.languageHint: The choice is remembered on this device.

rgpd.deleteHint: All your presets, data and history will be permanently deleted.
rgpd.deletePremiumWarn: You have an active Premium subscription. It will be cancelled immediately, with no automatic refund for the current period. Contact support@gametrend.fr if you want a refund.
rgpd.deleteLifetimeWarn: You have Lifetime access. It will be permanently lost and non-recoverable, even if you sign up again with the same email.
rgpd.deleteError: Deletion failed. Try again or contact support.
rgpd.rgpdNote: Export of your personal data per GDPR art. 20 (right to portability).

list.title: Presets
list.subtitle: Get inspired or build your own
list.seoTitle: Party game presets — built by the community
list.seoDescription: Browse hundreds of party game presets crafted by the GameTrend community. Play with friends for free using original themes or build your own in minutes.
list.intro: Explore presets imagined by the community to play with friends: fresh themes, custom card decks, word packs… Everything is free and built by other players.
list.createFirst: Be the first to create a preset!
list.resultsCount: {count, plural, one {# result} other {# results}} for

legal.frenchOnlyNotice: This English version is a translation provided for convenience only. The original French version, available at gametrend.fr/fr/legal, is the only legally binding version. GameTrend is operated from France under French law.

modal.title: Terms of use
modal.intro: Before continuing, please accept our terms:

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: Consent for analytics and advertising cookies is managed via Google's CMP (only shown in the EEA/UK/Switzerland). You can update your choices from your profile.

pwa.installText: Add the app to your home screen for quick access.
pwa.iosHint: Tap the share button then "Add to Home Screen"
pwa.androidHint: Open the game like a real app, no browser

errors.notFoundText: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or was deleted.
errors.unauthorized: You don't have access to this page

affiliate.title: Affiliate program
affiliate.subtitle: Invite creators and earn a recurring commission on their GameTrend subscriptions.
affiliate.activateError: Couldn't activate the program. Please retry.
affiliate.shareText: Sign up with my link and join the fun:
affiliate.editCodeHint: 3 to 30 characters: lowercase letters, digits, dashes and underscores.
affiliate.empty: Nobody has signed up with your link yet. Share it to get started!
affiliate.howItWorks: You earn {rate}% on every month your referrals pay their subscription — forever, as long as they stay subscribed.
affiliate.legalNote: Commission applies to subscriptions only (not one-time purchases). Earnings are validated after {days} days to cover the refund window, then paid out from €25 cumulative. If a referral cancels or is refunded, the matching commission is reversed.

funnel.title: Your referrals by status
funnel.potential: Potential: {amount} if all your trials convert

premium.title: GameTrend Premium
premium.subtitle: The subscription made for serious creators: no ads, no quotas, with the tools to grow.
premium.heroSubtitle: The full creator toolkit: zero ads, unlimited presets, analytics, boost and a custom profile.
premium.alreadyPremium: You're already on Premium — thanks for the support.
premium.lifetimeDescription: Reserved to the first 100 accounts. One-time payment, no renewal ever.
premium.trialHint: Cancel anytime from your portal. No charge before the trial ends.

errors.not_eligible: You're not eligible to this offer.
errors.missing_app_url: Server configuration incomplete (missing app URL). Contact support.
errors.invalid_app_url: Invalid server configuration (insecure URL). Contact support.
errors.lemon_422: Payment service rejected the request. Retry or contact support.
errors.lemon_401: Payment service authentication failed. Contact support.
errors.lemon_404: Plan not found in payment service. Contact support.
errors.lemon_500: Payment service is unavailable. Retry in a few minutes.
errors.fetch_failed: Couldn't reach payment service. Please retry.
errors.no_url_returned: Payment service returned no URL. Please retry.

trial.a: You unlock everything immediately. No charge before day 7. You can cancel anytime from your portal.

cancel.a: Yes, anytime, no questions asked. Premium remains active until the end of the paid period.

refund.a: The 7-day trial is here to test risk-free. Beyond that, no refunds, but you can cancel anytime.

lifetime.a: To reward the first 100 accounts who believe in the project. Once the spots are taken, the offer disappears for good.

profile.freeQuotaReached: You've hit the 5 active presets limit ({count}). Go Premium to create more.
profile.pastDueWarning: Your last payment failed. Update your card from the portal to keep your access.
profile.portalError: Couldn't open the portal. Please retry.
profile.upsellPremiumDesc: From €6.99/mo — cancel anytime. 7-day free trial with card.
profile.upsellLifetimeDesc: From €6.99/mo — or grab the Lifetime deal at €99 for lifetime access (reserved for the first 100 accounts).

customization.title: Premium customization
customization.linkHint: Twitch, YouTube, Discord, personal site… A single URL, shown publicly.
customization.bannerHint: Recommended landscape format 1200×400. JPG, PNG or WebP.
customization.accentHint: Used as a visual accent on your profile.

pinned.title: Pinned presets (5 max)
pinned.empty: You haven't created any preset to pin yet.

errors.notOwner: You can only pin your own presets.

analytics.title: Preset analytics
analytics.subtitle: Views, saves and conversions over the selected period.
analytics.paywallDescription: Visualize views, saves, conversions and top countries for each of your presets.

noAds.title: No ads
noAds.description: Enjoy GameTrend with zero banners or interstitials.

presetLimit.title: Unlimited presets
presetLimit.description: You've hit the 5 free presets limit. Create as many as you want with Premium.

profileLink.title: External profile link
profileLink.description: Show your Twitch, YouTube, Discord or other link right on your profile.

bannerAccent.title: Banner + accent color
bannerAccent.description: Customize your profile with a high-res banner and your signature color.

pinnedPresets.title: 5 pinned presets
pinnedPresets.description: Showcase up to 5 of your best presets at the top of your profile.

boostExplore.title: 24h auto-boost on Explore
boostExplore.description: Every preset you publish is highlighted on Explore for 24 hours.

analytics.title: Detailed analytics
analytics.description: See views, saves, conversions and top countries for each of your presets.

creatorBadge.title: Creator badge
creatorBadge.description: A ★ badge visible everywhere in the app showcases your creator status.
